data.title: Examining the Future: First Horizon's Earnings Outlook
Rocket Lab Stock Is Ripping Higher Tuesday: Here's Why
data.description: Shares of end-to-end space company Rocket Lab USA Inc (NASDAQ:RKLB) are moving higher Tuesday after the company announced its inclusion in two separate multi-billion dollar defense contracts.

data.title: Nasdaq Surges 100 Points; Bank of America Earnings Top Views
Despite Tariff Turmoil, Bank Of America CEO Says Consumer Is 'Continuing To Spend' (UPDATED)
data.description: Bank of America reported strong Q1 earnings, with net income of $7.4B and EPS of $0.90, beating analyst estimates. Revenue and net interest income also increased. Stock has declined 17% this year, but may see relief due to US-China tariff pause.

data.title: Why Is Grocery Giant Albertsons' Stock Price Shrinking Today?
data.description: Albertsons (NYSE: ACI) posted strong Q4 sales but weak margins. Revenue reached $18.80 billion, topping estimates, driven by a 2.3% rise in identical sales and 24% digital growth. Despite the sales beat, operating income plunged 35%. For FY25, the grocer expects EPS to be below the analyst forecasts.
